jobs.instruction: Read these emails. Identify the most important ones needing action today. For each: subject, sender, what action is needed, and urgency. Then briefly list FYI emails.

history.summary:
Here’s the prioritized action list followed by FYI emails:

---

**Action Required Today:**

1. Subject: Monitor is DOWN: unwrapgithub.onrender.com/
   Sender: UptimeRobot <alert@uptimerobot.com>
   Action: Investigate why unwrapgithub.onrender.com/ is down and restore service. Check logs, dependencies, or hosting status.
   Urgency: High (service outage)

2. Subject: Re: [withinJoel/JoelOS] Bump
history.fullResponse:
Here’s the prioritized action list followed by FYI emails:

---

**Action Required Today:**

1. Subject: Monitor is DOWN: unwrapgithub.onrender.com/
   Sender: UptimeRobot <alert@uptimerobot.com>
   Action: Investigate why unwrapgithub.onrender.com/ is down and restore service. Check logs, dependencies, or hosting status.
   Urgency: High (service outage)

2. Subject: Re: [withinJoel/JoelOS] Bump electron from 41.0.3 to 41.0.4 (PR #91)
   Sender: cloudflare-workers-and-pages[bot] <notifications@github.com>
   Action: Review the successful deploy of JoelOS via Cloudflare Pages. Verify the preview URL and merge the PR if everything looks correct.
   Urgency: Medium (pending deployment review)

3. Subject: [withinJoel/JoelOS] Bump electron from 41.0.3 to 41.0.4 (PR #91)
   Sender: dependabot[bot] <notifications@github.com>
   Action: Review the Dependabot PR for Electron version bump. Merge if no conflicts or issues are found.
   Urgency: Medium (dependency update)

4. Subject: [withinJoel/EraWanderer] Bump phpstan/phpstan from 2.1.42 to 2.1.43 (PR #33)
   Sender: dependabot[bot] <notifications@github.com>
   Action: Review the Dependabot PR for PHPStan version bump. Merge if no conflicts or issues are found.
   Urgency: Medium (dependency update)

---

**FYI Emails (No Immediate Action Needed):**

1. Monitor is UP: unwrapgithub.onrender.com/ — UptimeRobot
2. Even the best-case scenario for energy markets is disastrous — The Economist’s week ahead
3. Juniper Square is looking for Technical Lead, AI Initiatives - India and 13 more new jobs — Jooble
4. Introducing AI Reimagine ⭐ — IconScout
5. Your job alerts: Data Analyst — Hays
6. Your colleagues are getting a 56% pay bump. Are you? — ivee
7. Weekly Statement of Funds & Securities | INDmoney — INDmoney Statements
8. Get 50% OFF: Save big on features to boost your site — Wix.com
9. “front end developer”: Intric - Frontend Engineer and more — LinkedIn Job Alerts
10. Daily Trading & Investment Ideas - These 10 banking stocks have an upside potential of up to 26% in 1 year — The Economic Times
11. Month-End Rush: Free Swiggy One with your Loan — Jupiter
12. Your first MTF trade, simplified — Groww
13. Software Engineer at Hashtech Info and 12 more jobs in Remote, Gabon — Glassdoor Jobs
14. Full Stack Developer (Remote) at ICF and 10 more jobs in Remote, Gabon — Glassdoor Jobs
15. New jobs in Remote, Gabon. Apply Now. — Glassdoor Jobs
16. Senior Full Stack Engineer at Humana and 12 more jobs in Remote, Gabon — Glassdoor Jobs
